mission.title: thanos: Compact: Offline deduplication
mission.description: Compact: Offline deduplication. Requested by 31+ users.

steps.title: Check current thanos deployment
steps.description:
Verify your thanos version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos
helm list -n thanos 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working thanos installation.

steps.title: Review thanos configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant thanos configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos
kubectl get configmap -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=thanos
```
Currently Thanos provides dedup function in Query component, it can merge the data on the fly from Prometheus HA pairs or remote object storage.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Compact: Offline deduplication
steps.description:
As the discussion in #1014, implement a new feature in compactor which provides offline deduplication function for the data from different replicas.

The offline deduplication follow the same design with [query deduplication](https://thanos.io/components/query.md/#deduplication). The user needs to
```yaml
| 01E4N18DW7663APZ5V0B3D3CY1 | 30-03-2020 05:30:00 | 30-03-2020 06:00:00 | 30m0s    | 39h30m0s   | 545,049    | 50,824,911     | 545,054     | 1          | false       | replica=thanos-receive-0 | 0s         | receive   |
| 01E4N18DW8A4Z0ES2GCXBFEVVH | 30-03-2020 05:30:00 | 30-03-2020 06:00:00 | 30m0s    | 39h30m0s   | 545,049    | 50,824,911     | 545,054     | 1          | false       | replica=thanos-receive-2 | 0s         | receive   |
| 01E4N18DW8AR0CRXN0F4N0F7VY | 30-03-2020 05:30:00 | 30-03-2020 06:00:00 | 30m0s    | 39h30m0s   | 545,049    | 50,824,911     | 545,054     | 1          | 
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos
kubectl get events -n thanos --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Compact: Offline deduplication" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
As the discussion in #1014, implement a new feature in compactor which provides offline deduplication function for the data from different replicas.

The offline deduplication follow the same design with [query deduplication](https://thanos.io/components/query.md/#deduplication).

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with thanos installed or the issue environment reproducible.
